label: agent loop • cancellation after two calls leaves no work beyond the cancel point
query: Create these files one at a time, one per turn, in order: first alpha.txt with the word ALPHA, then beta.txt with the word BETA, then gamma.txt with the word GAMMA, then delta.txt with the word DELTA.
notes: Cancellation at a later checkpoint: the loop runs two processed tool calls, then cancels. Exit must be 'cancelled' and the tail work must not have run — delta.txt (the last step) must never exist. Pins that cancellation stops the loop promptly rather than draining the queued plan. The ResourceSampler footprint rides along for the RAM-recovery signal in the report. Off-CI (needs a model).
